body_txt: The tendency of some writers to just throw in a samurai for the heck of it, even in modern urban Japan or a western world without a Japanese Counterpart Culture . And also the fact that people tend to dig the samurai. Who doesn't dig Sanger ? Rule of Cool may be responsible... See also Wutai , Gratuitous Katana , Gratuitous Ninja , Katana Superiority , Samurai Cowboy , and Western Samurai .
